headline: Why Is Xylem (XYL) Down 4.6% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Xylem (XYL) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: 2 Oversold Stocks Primed to Rebound and 1 We Avoid
summary: Rock-bottom prices don’t always mean rock-bottom businesses. The stocks we’re examining today have all touched their 52-week lows, creating a classic investor’s dilemma: bargain opportunity or value trap?
